title: Masked work planning sample
originalRequest: Work request intentionally summarized. Sensitive company details are not included in this sample.
interpretedGoal: Demonstrate how a work-related Claude record should be stored with private visibility and masked details.
privacyNotes: This sample intentionally avoids customer names, internal systems, credentials, URLs, and proprietary details.

tasks.title: Summarize work request without sensitive details
tasks.notes: Use neutral project labels and avoid confidential identifiers.

tasks.title: Confirm dashboard can filter work records
tasks.notes: Work context should be clearly separated from personal context.

updates.message: Status changed from planned to done.
Created masked work sample for Claude records.
